title: feat(play): remove anonymous publishable key, gate generation on login
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Keys to the hive
gist.blurb: The Play page just got a major upgrade for creators! We've introduced a streamlined login flow and App Key attribution so you get full credit for your generations. Just sign in to unlock the entire model catalog.
gist.summary: The Play page has been updated to feature a streamlined authenticated experience, replacing anonymous access with a personalized login flow and BYOP attribution.
gist.impact: Users will now log in to unlock the full model catalog, providing a more personalized experience and proper traffic attribution for creators.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny golden key next to a cozy pixel-art login terminal with a sprouting code-plant. The monitor robot is excitedly looking at a personalized ID badge, representing the new authenticated BYOP experience.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing golden key next to a retro computer terminal displaying a welcoming login screen, with a small code-plant sprouting from a pot nearby. A chunky monitor-headed robot stands next to it, proudly wearing a pixelated ID badge. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing golden key next to a retro computer terminal displaying a welcoming login screen, with a small code-plant sprouting from a pot nearby. A chunky monitor-headed robot stands next to it, proudly wearing a pixelated ID badge. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
